name: Intouch
description_short: In Touch Ministries is a Christian teaching ministry led by Dr. Charles Stanley offering biblical guidance and spiritual content, not financial services.
description_long: In Touch Ministries is the teaching ministry of Dr. Charles Stanley, a prominent Christian pastor and evangelist. Founded to lead people worldwide into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ and strengthen the local church, the organization operates as a faith-based ministry rather than a financial services provider. The ministry delivers biblical teaching through multiple media channels including television sermons, radio broadcasts, devotional articles, and video content focused on Christian spirituality and life principles. The organization emphasizes spiritual guidance grounded in scripture, offering content on topics like handling pride, understanding resurrection and redemption, confronting anxiety, and pursuing humility through a Christian worldview. What distinguishes In Touch is its multi-platform approach to faith teaching, with 24/7 radio streaming, weekly TV sermons, featured articles, and faith stories designed to help believers deepen their relationship with God. The ministry does not provide financial counseling, credit repair, loans, debt relief, or any consumer finance services—it is exclusively a religious educational organization. This organization has been significantly miscategorized on CreditDoc and should not appear in any consumer finance database, as it offers no financial products, services, or counsel whatsoever.
services: Local TV and radio station finder
Video sermon library with captions and playback options
pros: Free access to extensive biblical teaching content across multiple platforms
24/7 streaming radio access to sermons and spiritual guidance
Weekly TV sermons and featured video content available online
Searchable article library covering various faith-based life topics
Multi-format content delivery (audio, video, text) for accessibility
Content from established Christian leader Dr. Charles Stanley with decades of ministry experience
Global reach with broadcast availability worldwide
cons: Not a financial services provider—provides no loans, credit repair, or debt relief
Exclusively Christian faith-based content with no secular financial guidance
No consumer finance tools, calculators, or borrowing options available
Does not address credit scores, debt management, or emergency cash needs
Completely inappropriate categorization as a payday alternative or financial product
best_for: Christians seeking biblical teaching and spiritual guidance
People wanting faith-based perspective on life challenges
Individuals interested in Dr. Charles Stanley's ministry
diagnosis: This is a religious ministry organization, not a consumer finance company, and should be removed from CreditDoc entirely. There is no financial product or service offered—the categorization as a payday alternative is factually incorrect and misleading to consumers seeking actual financial assistance.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
